name: Sullivan Street Bakery
teaser: Jim Lahey was one of the first doing Roman style pizza in America. Still the best I've ever had on this continent.
review: Okay, it's a bakery. But Jim Lahey was also one of the first folks in America doing Roman style pizza and it's still the best I've ever had on this continent. It is truly perfect bread with stuff (tomato, potato, try them all) on top. That's pizza.
headsUp: It is a bakery that happens to make the best Roman-style in America.
update: The potato pizza remains one of the most underrated bites in NYC.
